message:
🐛 fix(watchdog): fixed layout (no shift) + version info in loading page

Three fixes to the watchdog startup/loading page:

1. Fixed tip container height (3.5rem + overflow:hidden) — rotating
   tips with different text lengths no longer push the Retry button
   down (CLS fix).

2. Fixed wrapper width (480px + max-width for mobile) — content no
   longer shifts horizontally when tip text changes.

3. Version info in bottom-right corner — shows 'v{version} · {commit}'
   matching the login page style. Injected at serve time via
   api.GetBuildInfo() (new exported accessor for VCS metadata).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -509,9 +509,7 @@ export function Layout({ children: _children }: LayoutProps) { className="relative flex-1 p-4 pb-24 pb-[calc(6rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] md:p-6 md:pb-28 md:pb-[calc(7rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] transition-[margin] duration-300 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden scroll-enhanced min-w-0" > - }> - - +
